data.title: White Castle Offers 10-Sack of Original Sliders for $8.99
data.description: Headquartered in Columbus, Ohio, White Castle is providing budget-friendly options during challenging times by offering a 10-sack of Original Sliders for $8.99 starting April 28. This deal is available in all markets, except Florida and Las Vegas, amounting to 90 cents per Slider. Customers can enjoy savings ranging from 10% to 29% off the regular price, catering to those craving for value and delicious food from the iconic chain, known for its hot and tasty offerings for over a century.

data.title: Gorman-Rupp Company Declares Cash Dividend
data.description: The company, Gorman-Rupp Co. (NYSE: GRC), based in Mansfield, Ohio, recently announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.19 per share for its common stock. The upcoming payment is scheduled for June 10, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 15, 2026. This dividend payment will be the 305th consecutive quarterly dividend disbursed by the company since its establishment in 1933. Specialized in designing, manufacturing, and marketing pumps and pump systems globally, The Gorman-Rupp Company remains a prominent player in the industry.

data.title: Apogee Enterprises Reports Fiscal 2026 Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results
data.description: Apogee Enterprises, Inc., a top provider of architectural building products and services, as well as high-performance coated materials for various uses, released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of fiscal 2026. The period ending on February 28, 2026, showed significant figures. Total revenue for the quarter amounted to $X million, with a net income of $Y million. Earnings per share for the quarter were Z cents. In comparison, the full fiscal year numbers were also strong, with total revenue hitting $A million and net income at $B million. Earnings per share for the full year stood at C cents. The company trades on the Nasdaq under the symbol APOG.

data.title: KE Holdings Inc. to Hold Annual General Meeting on June 12, 2026
data.description: Beijing, April 24, 2026 - KE Holdings Inc. ("Beike" or the "Company") announced its annual general meeting for shareholders (AGM) will be held on Friday, June 12, 2026, at 3:00 p.m. Beijing time at Oriental Electronic Technology Building, No. 2 Chuangye Road, Haidian District, Beijing, PRC. Shareholders will consider and vote on Proposed Resolutions outlined in the AGM Notice available on the Company's website. The board of directors supports these Resolutions and urges shareholders and ADS holders to vote in favor. KE Holdings Inc. is a leading online and offline platform for housing transactions and services, listed on NYSE as BEKE and HKEX as 2423.

data.title: Novartis receives positive CHMP opinion for Itvisma® for spinal muscular atrophy (SMA)
data.description: In Basel on April 24, 2026, Novartis revealed that the Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) of the European Medicines Agency (EMA) has issued a favorable opinion proposing marketing approval for Itvisma® (intrathecal onasemnogene abeparvovec). The opinion backs its application in treating individuals aged two years and above, teenagers, and grown-ups coping with 5q spinal muscular atrophy (SMA) possessing a bi-allelic mutation in the survival motor neuron 1 (SMN1) gene.

data.title: Perspective Therapeutics to Provide Several Upcoming Corporate Updates
data.description: On April 24, 2026, Perspective Therapeutics, Inc. (NYSE AMERICAN: CATX), a leading radiopharmaceutical development firm focusing on innovative cancer treatments, unveiled plans for forthcoming corporate announcements in May 2026. The updates will cover significant developments within the company and its projects. Interested parties can access webcasts of these disclosures on Perspective's official website at www.perspectivetherapeutics.com.

data.title: BOSS Zhipin's Ongoing Share Repurchases Cross the RMB1 Billion Mark in 2026
data.description: Beijing, April 24, 2026 - KANZHUN LIMITED, known as "BOSS Zhipin," revealed that it has utilized RMB27.3 million to repurchase 597,224 ordinary shares on April 23. The company, listed as BZ on Nasdaq and 2076 on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, has already spent over RMB1 billion on share repurchases in 2026. This move highlights the firm's dedication to enhancing shareholder value through its ongoing share repurchase program.

data.title: Multitude AG: Decisions of the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders of Multitude AG
data.description: Zug, 24th April 2026 - Multitude AG, a European FinTech company traded on the stock market, that provides digital lending and online banking services to a wide range of clients including consumers, small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs), and institutional clients, has disclosed the outcomes of its Annual General Meeting held today.

data.title: Comfort Systems Stock Hits 52-Week High - Here's Why
data.description: Comfort Systems USA, Inc. (NYSE: FIX) saw its stock rise in premarket trading after reporting strong first-quarter results. Earnings came in at $10.51 per share, surpassing the $6.78 estimate, with revenue totaling $2.865 billion compared to the expected $2.384 billion. The gross profit margin also improved to 26.3% from 22.0% year-over-year. The company's backlog reached $12.45 billion as of March 31, while cash and cash equivalents stood at $1.05 billion. Additionally, a quarterly dividend of 80 cents per share was declared, a 10 cent increase from the previous payout, set to be paid on May 26, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 15, 2026.

data.title: New Study Highlights Safety and Efficacy Profile of Haemonetics' VASCADE MVP® XL in Large-Bore Venous Access Closure Procedures
data.description: Haemonetics Corporation (NYSE: HAE), a leading global medical technology firm dedicated to enhancing patient outcomes, recently released a study in Boston on April 24, 2026. The study delves into the VASCADE MVP® XL vascular closure system, comparing its effectiveness.

data.title: IoT in Agriculture Market Expected to Reach $84.5 Billion by 2031, at a CAGR of 12.6% : Allied Market Research
data.description: The demand for food worldwide is increasing, leading to the swift adoption of precision farming and cloud-based platforms for agricultural experimentation, especially on an industrial level. The IoT in Agriculture Market is experiencing significant growth, fueled by connected sensor technologies, making it a prominent sector in agritech.
